---
title: "Triticum Tale"
---

::: {.hero}
# Decode Durum Resilience

**Triticum Tale** transforms multi-omic stress data into a clear scientific narrative of how *Triticum durum* adapts under heat and drought pressure.

[EXPLORAR ESTRÉS TÉRMICO](heat-stress.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

Welcome to **Triticum Tale**, a digital museum for multi-omic stress data in *Triticum durum*.

This project brings together transcriptomic, metabolomic, and integrative analyses to explore how durum wheat responds to heat and drought stress through interactive, narrative-driven visualizations.

## Explore the story

Below is an interactive Plotly visualization that showcases simulated stress-response separation.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Ensure plotly is available
if (!require("plotly", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("plotly", repos = "http://cran.us.r-project.org")

library(plotly)

# Simulate Multi-Omic PCA data for Triticum durum
set.seed(42)
n_samples <- 40
pca_data <- data.frame(
  Sample = paste0("Durum_WT_", 1:(n_samples*3)),
  Treatment = factor(rep(c("Control", "Estrés Térmico", "Estrés Hídrico"), each = n_samples)),
  PC1 = c(rnorm(n_samples, -5, 1.5), rnorm(n_samples, 4, 2), rnorm(n_samples, 1, 1.8)),
  PC2 = c(rnorm(n_samples, 0, 1.5), rnorm(n_samples, 3, 1.5), rnorm(n_samples, -4, 1.5))
)

# Create interactive plot
plot_ly(data = pca_data, x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, color = ~Treatment,
        colors = c("#003b71", "#8c2d19", "#c5a059"),
        type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
        marker = list(size = 9, opacity = 0.8, line = list(width = 1, color = 'white')),
        hoverinfo = "text",
        text = ~paste("<b>", Sample, "</b><br>Tratamiento:", Treatment, "<br>PC1:", round(PC1,2), "<br>PC2:", round(PC2,2))) %>%
  layout(title = "PCA Simulado: Perfil Transcriptómico",
         plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
         xaxis = list(title = "PC1 (42.5%)", showgrid = TRUE, gridcolor = "#e5e5e5"),
         yaxis = list(title = "PC2 (15.3%)", showgrid = TRUE, gridcolor = "#e5e5e5"))
```

## Reproducibility Bridge

::: {.text-center .mt-4 .mb-5}
<a href="https://github.com/PALP31/BioAgro-Stats" class="btn btn-outline-primary" aria-label="Ver Pipeline Estadístico en GitHub">📊 Ver Pipeline Estadístico en GitHub</a>

*Todas las visualizaciones están respaldadas por modelos lineales mixtos y análisis multi-ómicos reproducibles.*
:::
